textByHashes.9f2b05ce2b3b6c43628e28dbdcb7f5e99bcc4d6c: Welcome, iknami. What can I get you?
textByHashes.80795ffe87945b6424c2d20671f1bceab8415803: The king? No, no, you won't be finding anybody like that around these parts!
textByHashes.82fffbafb8e77ca1c04caf4f200b7be5cebe4fe1: Oh! That's me, yes. What can I do for you?
textByHashes.d608a3e238e51020abde105d5ddf21a27da22742: An egg fell off a wall?
textByHashes.1d9bcc247bedb07b4cd803245b38a3ad8eda7d92: Yes, I guess I have managed to gain a bit of a reputation when it comes to situations like this. After all, there's a reason everyone calls me King.
textByHashes.5dae16846b0eb781ed9522ffe100a2e45a8ec6fb: Still, putting a broken egg back together again... That does sound like quite the challenge. Unfortunately, I'm afraid I need to stay here and man the bar. However...
textByHashes.8c3153b93c52736be1b68fd35bcddb6458f05b1c: I have a plan, but it's going to take all my horses and all my men.
textByHashes.a75bbbff6359da4caae9c4b73a5ded7d10683542: They'll be up to the task, but you'll need to rally them up.
textByHashes.c1dcbd5e15f9993935a8ce6730325f68e402d51d: Nezketi should be in the temple just south of here, Kauayotl will most likely be just outside the main entrance into town, and Acatzin is right here in the inn.
textByHashes.017c979708e517a803656b9798a0e2539fedbab8: I think you came to the right person. I've managed to gain a bit of a reputation when it comes to situations like this. There's a reason everyone calls me King.
textByHashes.40bc4e9ec08db5f8542b4585582b7cfa287edceb: Still putting a broken egg back together again... That does sound like quite the challenge. Unfortunately, I'm afraid I need to stay here and man the bar. However...
textByHashes.7f3d27d3e3a26da106ed4664ae0acba9f2883b4c: Welcome back, iknami. What can I get you?
textByHashes.94b1fea92a5170883248ced816b276ce2266aa51: Then I've done all I can. The rest is now in their hands, and yours. Good luck, iknami.
textByHashes.48d4135052fb0f19020af1f417219ec4af69fe56: Welcome back, iknami. I hear you managed to solve your egg problem.
textByHashes.045991a4cbe90ee8189baa9bb2599700ca5e7f59: Glad to hear it. Now, what can I get you?
